comment: Map Kalshi weather series to NWS/METAR station and resolution source. Copy to stations.json.

stations.name: NYC High Temp
stations.notes: Central Park (Belvedere Castle), not an airport. METAR-style 24h high ~04:51 UTC.

stations.name: Chicago High Temp
